##LOCALITY=Potash Corporation of Saskatchewan mine, Penobsquis, Kings County, New Brunswick, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Donald M Doell and Brian Roulston
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless elongated tetragonal prisms, extracted by dissolving the matrix of sylvite/halite, associated with howlite R110150, volkovskite R110151, ruitenbergite R110152, congolite R110153, and hilgardite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110149
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
